sections.markdown:
- Activity: Lunch Run
- Started: 2025-05-31 11:46
- Distance: 5.2 km
- Moving time: 49:23
- Elapsed time: 50:18
- Elevation gain: 28.2 m
- Average heart rate: 120.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 144 bpm
- Average watts: 124.9 W
- Average speed: 6.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `119.3 bpm`, ranging from `113.5` to `128.8 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `115.3 bpm` and second-half average HR was `122.0 bpm` (+6.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `154.6 spm`, with a working range of `126.3` to `161.4 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `152.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `154.2 spm` (+1.3 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `9:28 /km` across `5.217 km` in `49:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `9:48 /km` and second-half pace was `9:08 /km` (-40 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `120.6 bpm` average and `144 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `115.8 bpm` in the first half and `125.3 bpm` in the second (+9.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `49:23` out of `50:18` elapsed (98.2%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `115` stop segments and `23.0%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `61.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.6 m` and `12.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `34.2 m` in the first half and `27.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
